attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SCOL.ORDER_LINE_ID  AS CCW_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
SCOL.ORDER_LINE_ID AS SK_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT, 
NCO.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID AS BK_WEB_ORDER_ID,
COALESCE(SCOL.LIST_PRICE,-999) AS LIST_TRANSACTIONAL_PRICE, 
CASE WHEN ACTIVE = 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
NP.ITEM_KEY AS COVERED_PRDT_ITEM_KEY, 
COALESCE(SCOL.BUNDLE_ADJ_LIST_PRICE,-999) AS BUNDLE_ADJUSTED_LIST_PRICE, 
COALESCE(SCOL.BUNDLE_DISC,-999) AS BUNDLE_DISCOUNT_PCT, 
COALESCE(SCOL.BUNDLE_DISC_AMT,-999) AS BUNDLE_DISCOUNT_AMT, 
COALESCE(SCOL.BUNDLE_ORIGINAL_LIST_PRICE,-999) AS BUNDLE_ORIGINAL_LIST_PRICE,
COALESCE(SCOL.CONFIGURABLE_FLAG,'N') AS CONFIGURABLE_FLG, 
CASE WHEN SCOL.DELIVERY_OPTION ='ELECTRONIC OR PHYSICAL' THEN 'ELECRPHSL'
     WHEN SCOL.DELIVERY_OPTION IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN'
	 ELSE SCOL.DELIVERY_OPTION END AS DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,
COALESCE(SCOL.CHARGE_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS CHARGE_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(SCOL.CONFIG_PATH,'UNKNOWN') AS REQUESTED_CONFIG_DESC, 
COALESCE(SCOL.CONFIGURABLE_FLAG,'N') AS REQUESTED_CONFIG_VALID_FLG, 
COALESCE(SCOL.CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS CREATED_BY_USER, 
COALESCE(SCOL.CREATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS CCW_ORDER_LINE_CREATED_DTM, 
CAST(CCW_ORDER_LINE_CREATED_DTM AS DATE)AS DV_CCW_ORDER_LINE_CREATED_DT, 
COALESCE(SCOL.END_CUSTOMER_EMAIL,'UNKNOWN') AS END_CUST_EMAIL_ADDR,
COALESCE(SCOL.MLB_INDICATOR,'N') AS MULTI_LN_BUNDLE_INDICATOR_FLG, 
COALESCE(SCOL.PARENT_ORDER_LINE_ID,-999) AS PARENT_CCW_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
COALESCE(SCOL.BUNDLE_OBJECT_ID,-999) AS BUNDLE_CCW_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
COALESCE(SCOL.DESCRIPTION,'UNKNOWN') AS CCW_ORDER_LINE_DESC, 
COALESCE(SCOL.EXT_LIST_PRICE,-999) AS EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE, 
COALESCE(SCOL.SOURCE_PRODUCT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS CCW_ORDER_LINE_PRDT_TYPE_CD, 
COALESCE(SCOL.QUANTITY,-999) AS CCW_ORDER_LINE_ORDERED_QTY, 
'UNKNOWN' AS CANCEL_REASON_COMMENT, 
COALESCE(SCOL.LINE_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS PRDT_BUNDLE_CONFIG_LINE_NUM, 
COALESCE(SCOL.LIST_PRICE, -999) AS LIST_PRICE,
TRIM(COALESCE(SCOL.LINE_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')) AS  CCW_ORDER_LINE_TYPE, 
NP.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY, 
COALESCE(SCOL.PART_CATEGORY,'UNKNOWN') AS PRODUCT_CATEGORY_CD, 
COALESCE(NDQL.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,-999) AS BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE(SCOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS EXTERNAL_CUST_PURCHASE_ORD_NUM, 
COALESCE(SCOL.REFURBISHED_FLAG,'N') AS REFURBISHED_FLG,
COALESCE(SCOL.ORIGINAL_LINE_SOURCE,'UNKNOWN') AS ORIGINAL_LINE_SOURCE_CD,
COALESCE(SCOL.SOURCE_LINE_ID,-999) AS SK_LINE_ID_INT,
COALESCE(SCOL.SOURCE_OBJECT_ID,-999) AS SK_OBJECT_ID_INT, 
COALESCE(SCOL.UCSB_SOLUTION_ID,-999) AS SK_UCSB_SOLUTION_ID_INT, 
COALESCE(SCOL.LINE_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN') AS LINE_ORIGIN_CD, 
COALESCE(SCOL.PARENT_SOURCE_LINE_ID,-999) AS SK_PARENT_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT, 
SCOL.INITIAL_TERM AS RU_INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
SCOL.DURATION AS RU_DURATION_DAYS_CNT,
SCOL.AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM AS RU_AUTO_RNWL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
SCOL.PREPAY_TERM AS RU_PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT, 
SCOL.SERVICE_END_DATE AS RU_SERVICE_END_DT, 
SCOL.SERVICE_START_DATE AS RU_SERVICE_START_DT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0), 
USER, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0), 
USER, 
/*Added as part of SOT XAAS -Q2FY16*/
COALESCE(SCOL.LICENSE_MODEL,'UNKNOWN') AS LICENSE_MODEL_CD, 
COALESCE(SCOL.OFFER_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS OFFER_TYPE_CD, 
COALESCE(SCOL.PRICING_URL_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS PRICING_URL_NAME,
CAST(COALESCE(CAST(SCOL.UPDATED_ON AS VARCHAR(19)),'3500-01-01 00:00:00')AS TIMESTAMP(0))
AS UPDATED_ON_DTM,
CAST(CAST(COALESCE(CAST (SCOL.UPDATED_ON  AS VARCHAR(19)),'3500-01-01 00:00:00') AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS DATE) AS DV_UPDATED_ON_DT,
COALESCE(SCOL.TRUEUP_TERM,-999) AS TRUEUP_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
COALESCE(SCOL.UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT,'UNKNOWN') AS UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD,
COALESCE(SCOL.USAGE_QUANTITY,-999) AS USAGE_QTY,
COALESCE(SCOL.SOFTWARE_LINE_STATUS,'UNKNOWN')AS XAAS_SOFTWARE_LINE_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(SCOL.ACTION_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS ACTION_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(SCOL.CHARGE_FREQUENCY,-999) AS CHARGE_FREQUENCY_MONTHS_CNT ,
COALESCE(SCOL.LINE_SUB_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS LINE_SUBTYPE_CD,
COALESCE(SCOL.PRICING_URL,'UNKNOWN') AS PRICING_URL_ADDR,
/*End- SOT XAAS -Q2FY16*/
'I' AS ACTION_CODE, 
'=' AS DML_TYPE,
COALESCE(SCOL.SALES_MOTION,'UNKNOWN') AS SALES_MOTION_CD,
COALESCE(SCOL.SALES_MOTION_CONTEXT,'UNKNOWN') AS SALES_MOTION_CONTEXT_CD,
COALESCE(SCOL.CXADMIN_CCOID,'UNKNOWN') AS CX_SUPER_USER_LDAP_USER_ID
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CO_ORDER_LINE SCOL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON SCOL.PART_NUMBER =NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID 
INNER JOIN (select SK_CCW_ORDER_ID_INT,BK_WEB_ORDER_ID from $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CCW_ORDER QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SK_CCW_ORDER_ID_INT ORDER BY BK_WEB_ORDER_ID DESC)=1) NCO
/*$$SLSORDVWDB.N_CCW_ORDER NCO */
ON NCO.SK_CCW_ORDER_ID_INT= SCOL.ORDER_ID
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE NDQL
 ON NDQL.SK_QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID_INT  = SCOL.QUOTE_LINE_ID

SELECT 
ECOL.ORDER_LINE_ID, ECOL.ORDER_ID, ECOL.LIST_PRICE, ECOL.ACTIVE, ECOL.BUNDLE_ADJ_LIST_PRICE, ECOL.BUNDLE_DISC, ECOL.BUNDLE_DISC_AMT, ECOL.BUNDLE_ORIGINAL_LIST_PRICE, ECOL.CONFIGURABLE_FLAG, ECOL.DELIVERY_OPTION, ECOL.CHARGE_TYPE, ECOL.CONFIG_PATH, ECOL.CREATED_BY, ECOL.CREATED_ON, ECOL.END_CUSTOMER_EMAIL, ECOL.MLB_INDICATOR, ECOL.PARENT_ORDER_LINE_ID, ECOL.BUNDLE_OBJECT_ID, ECOL.DESCRIPTION, ECOL.EXT_LIST_PRICE, ECOL.SOURCE_PRODUCT_TYPE, ECOL.QUANTITY, ECOL.CANCEL_REASON, ECOL.LINE_NUMBER, ECOL.LINE_TYPE, ECOL.PART_CATEGORY, ECOL.QUOTE_LINE_ID, ECOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER, ECOL.REFURBISHED_FLAG, ECOL.ORIGINAL_LINE_SOURCE, ECOL.SOURCE_LINE_ID, ECOL.SOURCE_OBJECT_ID, ECOL.UCSB_SOLUTION_ID, ECOL.LINE_ORIGIN, ECOL.PARENT_SOURCE_LINE_ID, ECOL.MANDATORY_SERVICE_FLAG, ECOL.FLEX_SERVICE_START_DATE, ECOL.FLEX_SERVICE_STATUS, ECOL.CONTRACT_NUMBER, ECOL.ORIGINAL_CONTRACT_NUMBER, ECOL.SERVICEABLE_FLAG, ECOL.PRODUCT_HAS_SERVICE, ECOL.PRODUCT_REQUIRE_SERVICE, ECOL.INITIAL_TERM, ECOL.DURATION, ECOL.AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM, ECOL.COVERED_PRODUCT_ITEM, ECOL.PREPAY_TERM, ECOL.SERVICE_END_DATE, ECOL.SERVICE_START_DATE, ECOL.PART_NUMBER, ECOL.UPDATED_ON 
/*Added as part of SOT XAAS -Q2FY16*/
,ECOL.LICENSE_MODEL
,ECOL.OFFER_TYPE
,ECOL.PRICING_URL_NAME
,ECOL.TRUEUP_TERM
,ECOL.UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT
,ECOL.USAGE_QUANTITY
,ECOL.SOFTWARE_LINE_STATUS
,ECOL.ACTION_TYPE
,ECOL.CHARGE_FREQUENCY
,ECOL.LINE_SUB_TYPE
,ECOL.PRICING_URL
,ECOL.SALES_MOTION
,ECOL.SALES_MOTION_CONTEXT
/*End- SOT XAAS -Q2FY16*/
,ECOL.CXADMIN_CCOID
,ECOL.CXADMIN_FN
,ECOL.CXADMIN_LN
,ECOL.CXADMIN_EML
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CO_ORDER_LINE ECOL
WHERE
NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CO_ORDER_LINE SCOL 
WHERE SCOL.ORDER_LINE_ID = ECOL.ORDER_LINE_ID)

SELECT 
SCOL.ORDER_LINE_ID, SCOL.ORDER_ID, SCOL.LIST_PRICE, SCOL.ACTIVE, SCOL.BUNDLE_ADJ_LIST_PRICE, SCOL.BUNDLE_DISC, SCOL.BUNDLE_DISC_AMT, SCOL.BUNDLE_ORIGINAL_LIST_PRICE, SCOL.CONFIGURABLE_FLAG, SCOL.DELIVERY_OPTION, SCOL.CHARGE_TYPE, SCOL.CONFIG_PATH, SCOL.CREATED_BY, SCOL.CREATED_ON, SCOL.END_CUSTOMER_EMAIL, SCOL.MLB_INDICATOR, SCOL.PARENT_ORDER_LINE_ID, SCOL.BUNDLE_OBJECT_ID, SCOL.DESCRIPTION, SCOL.EXT_LIST_PRICE, SCOL.SOURCE_PRODUCT_TYPE, SCOL.QUANTITY, SCOL.CANCEL_REASON, SCOL.LINE_NUMBER, SCOL.LINE_TYPE, SCOL.PART_CATEGORY, SCOL.QUOTE_LINE_ID, SCOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER, SCOL.REFURBISHED_FLAG, SCOL.ORIGINAL_LINE_SOURCE, SCOL.SOURCE_LINE_ID, SCOL.SOURCE_OBJECT_ID, SCOL.UCSB_SOLUTION_ID, SCOL.LINE_ORIGIN, SCOL.PARENT_SOURCE_LINE_ID, SCOL.MANDATORY_SERVICE_FLAG, SCOL.FLEX_SERVICE_START_DATE, SCOL.FLEX_SERVICE_STATUS, SCOL.CONTRACT_NUMBER, SCOL.ORIGINAL_CONTRACT_NUMBER, SCOL.SERVICEABLE_FLAG, SCOL.PRODUCT_HAS_SERVICE, SCOL.PRODUCT_REQUIRE_SERVICE, SCOL.INITIAL_TERM, SCOL.DURATION, SCOL.AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM, SCOL.COVERED_PRODUCT_ITEM, SCOL.PREPAY_TERM, SCOL.SERVICE_END_DATE, SCOL.SERVICE_START_DATE, SCOL.PART_NUMBER,
SCOL.UPDATED_ON,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
/*Added as part of SOT XAAS -Q2FY16*/
,SCOL.LICENSE_MODEL
,SCOL.OFFER_TYPE
,SCOL.PRICING_URL_NAME
,SCOL.TRUEUP_TERM
,SCOL.UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT
,SCOL.USAGE_QUANTITY
,SCOL.SOFTWARE_LINE_STATUS
,SCOL.ACTION_TYPE
,SCOL.CHARGE_FREQUENCY
,SCOL.LINE_SUB_TYPE
,SCOL.PRICING_URL
,SCOL.SALES_MOTION
,SCOL.SALES_MOTION_CONTEXT
/*End- SOT XAAS -Q2FY16*/
,SCOL.CXADMIN_CCOID
,SCOL.CXADMIN_FN
,SCOL.CXADMIN_LN
,SCOL.CXADMIN_EML
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CO_ORDER_LINE SCOL
WHERE	
NOT EXISTS(
SELECT	1 
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP 
WHERE NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = SCOL.PART_NUMBER)
